title: 2人で全力で走っていけるから

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Tracen Meet, where the students choose their own
events to race in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every year the academy booms with energy as visitors flood the
campus. In all that uproar, an unstoppable voice rises above the rest.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Rrraaaaagh! I wanna go faaaaast!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know it! This is the perfect chance for everyone to see the fruits
of our training!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It seems like lots of debuting students are doing the same
1,700-meter turf race that I chose...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, what was this called again? The pre... pre-lee...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The preliminaries.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! THAT! Oh, is that you, Hayahide? Gooood morning!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good morning. I'm glad to see you're in high spirits, Ticket. A lack of
anxiety means you can achieve your full potential.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh! Yep! All thanks to my trainer here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right! Let me introduce you to my classmate, Hayahide! She's SUPER smart!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And if she's here, that means... Let's seeeee...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah-ha! Taishiiin! Get over here, youuu!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Keep your big dumb voice down, stupid! Everyone's looking!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Sorry, sorry! But I'm so happy to see you two! Hayahide, I
didn't think you'd be here yet since your race is in the afternoon!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I wanted to observe your run.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awww! Thank youuu! I'm going to give it my best shot!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And what about you, Taishin? Hold on a sec—didn't you tell me you
usually skip these "boring" events?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I was just taking a walk and happened to pass through. It's irritatingly
noisy though, so I'm out.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No way! You're going home already?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But you have to see me show my stuff in the raaace! Don't make me
all saaad! Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, geez, quit crying, you baby!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm still leaving though. Later.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nooo! TAISHIIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Worry not, Ticket. Taishin went in the direction of the spectator
stands.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah, really?! T-T-Taishiiin! I'm SO touched by your super awkward friendship!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the heartwarming scene comes to an end, the time for Winning
Ticket to run arrives at long last.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Traaaineeer! It's time! I'm finally racing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You've been such a great trainer to stick with me. I... I could just...
Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! I need to tell you something before I start crying!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Well... I don't think I've ever inspired anyone with my running.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But still! I met you and learned a lot from our training. So, now... now
I...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nnngaaah! The words aren't comiiiiing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sorry! I'll just have to show you in the race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-chak!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The 1,700-meter turf begins! But what kind of show will these
potential stars give us?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket pulls out ahead! It's a strong, yet controlled, pace!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: (Hm? Huh?! What is this? It's so weird!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(Is it 'cause we trained together all that time? Did I learn this from all
the talking we did every day?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(Stay calm and watch your surroundings. Think about pacing. Stay at
your own speed... It's like I can hear Trainer's voice in my head.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Her running's different. When did she learn how to do that...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Fascinating! Heh, you've met a fine trainer, Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: (I understand... I see it, Trainer!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's the stretch! This is it, right?! Time for full poweeeeer!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket's speeding up! She's leaving everyone behind!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: She's going! She's really moving! What an incredible burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Urrraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: FINISH! Winning Ticket takes first! What a stunning victory!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thanks for cheering for me, everyooone!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Ticket! You were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaah, thank you, thank yooou! I'm so HAPPYYY!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll return the favor... Someday I'll be an Umamusume who inspires
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's why... I wanna vow to everyone here, as well as the trainer who
taught me how to run!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I promise... to become a Derby champiooon!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unlike at the tryouts, not one person doubts her words now.
